discrepancies.notes: Stephen Estatico (existing director) RESIGNED effective Jan 1, 2026 and moved to Pima USD. William Duarte (former Superior Jr/Sr High Principal/AD) assumed interim superintendent role on Jan 1, 2026. Email at @superiorusd.org confirmed for Duarte but format masked in public sources (likely bduarte@superiorusd.org). Very small district (335 students).
